assertions.title: No network requests during processing or interaction
assertions.reason: After clearing baseline network logs, processing+download generated local script/worker requests; CSP connect-src was not 'none'.

steps.action: Open app, wait for load, clear diagnostics/network baseline
steps.observed: Baseline requests file shows empty list.

steps.action: Upload detect-008-no-pii.pdf and run full cycle to Done screen
steps.observed: Post-cycle request log contains multiple GET requests to localhost:5173 modules/worker.
CSP was: default-src 'self' ...; connect-src ws://localhost:* http://localhost:*; worker-src 'self' blob:

assertions.issues: Contract requires zero requests after initial load and connect-src "none"; both conditions were not met.

assertions.title: No analytics, tracking, or third-party scripts
assertions.reason: Only same-origin scripts were present; no third-party script origins detected.

steps.observed: Only http://localhost:5173/@vite/client and http://localhost:5173/src/main.tsx were present.

assertions.title: No external fonts — system font stack only
assertions.reason: No font network requests and no @font-face rules were found; body computed font-family is system stack.

steps.action: Filter network requests for font resources

steps.expected: System font stack only; no remote @font-face
steps.observed: body font-family used system stack and fontFaceRuleCount was 0.

assertions.title: No document data persisted to browser storage
assertions.reason: localStorage, sessionStorage, and IndexedDB were empty after processing.

steps.observed: localKeys/sessionKeys were empty and indexedDbCount was 0.

assertions.title: Full cleanup on Start over — no residual data
assertions.reason: UI reset and second upload succeeded, but no explicit cleanup confirmation log was emitted in console.

steps.action: Upload first file and enter preview
steps.observed: Preview opened successfully with active controls.

steps.expected: Return to clean drop screen with cleanup confirmation
steps.observed: Returned to drop screen; console contained only Vite reconnect debug lines (no explicit cleanup log).

steps.expected: Second file processes cleanly with no stale state
steps.observed: Second file processed to preview successfully.

assertions.issues: Pass criteria explicitly calls for console cleanup confirmation; not observed.

assertions.title: No data contamination between sessions
assertions.reason: After Start over between PDF-A and PDF-B, UI showed only a fresh single-entity session and no DOM trace of PDF-A value.

steps.action: Create and upload PDF-A fixture (SSN 111-22-3333), verify preview
steps.observed: PDF-A preview rendered with one SSN entity session.

steps.action: Click Start over, then upload PDF-B fixture (SSN 444-55-6666)
steps.expected: Session B contains only B data and no A residue
steps.observed: PDF-B preview rendered as a fresh single-entity session; body text did not contain 111-22-3333.

frictions.description: Hidden input[type=file] was not directly interactable; had to expose it via temporary DOM style changes before each upload.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to make input visible and then uploaded via agent-browser upload.

frictions.description: agent-browser does not expose native DevTools Network/Sources/Application panes as screenshots.
frictions.resolution: Captured equivalent deterministic evidence via network requests JSON and DOM/storage eval outputs plus overlay screenshots.
